raises.purpose: Per BSE/NSE disclosure: working capital requirements incl. repayment to creditors and bank loans, and general corporate purposes. Management separately described the raise on the May 2026 concall as funding Kidcity's expansion needs.
raises.source: BSE/NSE preferential allotment announcement; EGM approval 11 May 2026; NSE in-principle approval 5 Jun 2026; Board allotment 18 Jun 2026
raises.note: 14 allottees total: 13 promoter/promoter-group entities + 1 non-promoter (Bhagwan Nath Sidh). Issue price Rs121 vs Rs10 face value; roughly in line with CMP at allotment, not a steep discount.
